title: API Rate Limit Exceeded
description: Developer reporting constant 429 errors even though they are well within their tier limits.

title: Dark Mode Contrast Issues
description: Accessibility feedback: the text on the dashboard is unreadable when Dark Mode is enabled.

title: Export to CSV Failing
description: When trying to export the monthly report, the app hangs and eventually returns a 504 Gateway Timeout.

title: Bulk User Upload Error
description: Attempting to upload a CSV with 50+ users fails with an 'Unexpected Token' error message.

title: Incorrect Currency on Invoice
description: Customer is located in the UK but their latest invoice #9942 was generated in USD instead of GBP.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: The 'Forgot Password' link sent via email expires in under 2 minutes, which is too fast for the user.

title: Database Connection Timeout
description: Intermittent connectivity issues reported on the US-East server cluster during peak hours.

title: Update Notification Preferences
description: User wants to disable marketing emails but the 'Save' button in settings is grayed out.

title: Broken Link in Documentation
description: The 'Getting Started' guide has a dead link pointing to a non-existent Github repository.

title: Duplicate Charges on Account
description: Customer was billed twice for the same 'Pro' subscription in the month of January.

title: Slow Dashboard Load Times
description: Analytics dashboard taking over 10 seconds to render charts for users with large datasets.

title: Integration with Slack Failing
description: The Slack webhook is not posting notifications even though the test connection succeeds.

title: Requested Feature: PDF Annotations
description: The design team would like the ability to leave comments directly on uploaded PDF proofs.

title: Missing MFA Recovery Codes
description: Customer lost their phone and does not have their recovery codes to bypass 2FA.

title: Welcome Email Not Received
description: New signups are reporting that they aren't receiving the mandatory verification email.
